profile.bio: I write a newsletter you should subscribe to. richardhanania.com. Monthly columns @unherd @BostonGlobe

tweets.text: Megapost on the Iran War situation coming this week. It will be available for free to all. Sign up now (leave your email) not to miss it. richardhanania.com
newyorker.com/magazine/2026/...
Conservatives wanted a freer internet. Smarter ones are coming to realize you need quality control. It's supposed to be the libs who believe in radical egalitarianism!

The funny thing about "Buy American" is that you're allowed to do that now. But people shop according to price and quality. If they truly cared about nationalist goals, you wouldn't need to force them. richardhanania.com/p/two-way...

While we're talking about the Twitter algorithm, I just noticed this got 1.6 million views. My links to reviews of Dostoevsky and deep dives into state housing policy, subjects of recent articles, will never get a fraction of that. Fine, I'll post some slop. This kind isn't deceiving anyone and it's harmless, which is different from fake news merchants. But I do it so that some small percentage of people who find it subscribe to the newsletter and get the higher quality work.
Interesting choice for Stewie.

This kind of brain rot is about as depressing as Catturd's popularity. Seeing the degree to which right wingers refuse to deal with reality has radicalized me in favor of the MSM. richardhanania.com/p/why-the...
These people are actually happy to be part of a movement where Catturd is their intellectual leader. Why doesn't the New York Times become more like him! Huh, libs? Afraid of open debate?

The problem with Twitter isn't a lack of "viewpoint diversity." We have plenty! Nazis and Jackson Hinkle and Tucker have differences between them. The problem is that the new X is dominated by trash. What a bizarre blind spot to not see lack of quality as the problem.

Elon Musk: The best evidence that the X algorithm pushes low quality info is that it gives us Nate Silver tweets. Not that Gunther and Jackson Hinkle dominate the algorithm. How can someone so smart in some areas be this stupid? richardhanania.com/p/liberal...
Why is Abott celebrating Diwali now? Add this to the evidence that this website has been taken over by trash. This one was invited to the White House press briefing. Dystopian.

Polls show that people in war zones, like Ukraine and Gaza, want to keep fighting, but we all know many would leave if they could. What explains this disparity? I make the case for taking people's personal preferences seriously over political ones. richardhanania.com/p/two-way...
washingtonpost.com/world/202...

Orban gave postliberals an institution with its own stake in a previously state-owned oil company, which benefits from cheap Russian oil. If you thought this stuff was anti-American, you're right. An authoritarian ideology imported from the heart of the old Hapsburg empire.
Jesus Christ. This is discourse hell. If this doesn't make you say bring back the gatekeepers, I don't know what will. richardhanania.com/p/bring-b...
Now that's thinking outside the box.
Countries with the most champagne must have the least water.
Such slop

Before you get mad at this, realize you're probably getting mad at a foreign backed AI account. Nobody with the least familiarity with Americans would think a person who looks like this with these views is possible.
The community notes shows why you need to get your worldview from reading instead of pictures and videos. They develop their worldview in the same way as toddlers who haven't yet learned how to read.
God this article made me support European governments locking up every last rightoid. They don't eat at specific times according to the rules! They have bus boys!
